# EdgeBase C++ Core SDK

Use this file as a quick-reference contract for AI coding assistants working with the pure C++17 EdgeBase client SDK in `packages/sdk/cpp/packages/core`.

## Package Boundary

Use this package for native client-side C++ apps and engine integrations that need the EdgeBase client surface without Unreal-specific wrappers.

This package is not a privileged admin SDK. Do not assume Service Key flows, raw SQL admin helpers, admin auth management, or other trusted server-only APIs exist here. If you need privileged backend access, use an EdgeBase admin SDK in a server runtime or call your own backend.

## Source Of Truth

- Package overview: https://github.com/edge-base/edgebase/blob/main/packages/sdk/cpp/README.md
- Public header: https://github.com/edge-base/edgebase/blob/main/packages/sdk/cpp/packages/core/include/edgebase/edgebase.h
- Generated client wrappers: https://github.com/edge-base/edgebase/blob/main/packages/sdk/cpp/packages/core/include/edgebase/generated/client_wrappers.h
- Quickstart: https://edgebase.fun/docs/getting-started/quickstart
- Authentication: https://edgebase.fun/docs/authentication
- Database client SDK: https://edgebase.fun/docs/database/client-sdk
- Database subscriptions: https://edgebase.fun/docs/database/subscriptions
- Storage upload/download: https://edgebase.fun/docs/storage/upload-download
- Functions client SDK: https://edgebase.fun/docs/functions/client-sdk
- Push client SDK: https://edgebase.fun/docs/push/client-sdk
- Analytics client SDK: https://edgebase.fun/docs/analytics/client-sdk
- Room client SDK: https://edgebase.fun/docs/room/client-sdk

If docs, snippets, and assumptions disagree, prefer the current header/API surface over guessed patterns from another runtime.

## Canonical Examples

### Create a client

```cpp
#include <edgebase/edgebase.h>

eb::EdgeBase client("https://your-project.edgebase.fun");
```

### Sign in and read the current user

```cpp
auto result = client.auth().signIn("june@example.com", "pass1234");

if (result.ok) {
  std::string userJson = client.auth().currentUser();
}
```

### Query data

```cpp
auto scores = client.db("shared")
    .table("scores")
    .where("stage", "==", "5")
    .orderBy("score", "desc")
    .limit(10)
    .getList();
```

### Upload a file

```cpp
std::vector<uint8_t> bytes = {0x01, 0x02, 0x03};

auto upload = client.storage()
    .bucket("avatars")
    .upload("user123.bin", bytes, "application/octet-stream");
```

### Call a function

```cpp
auto response = client.functions().post(
    "contact/send",
    R"({"email":"june@example.com","message":"hello"})");
```

### Join a room

```cpp
auto room = client.room("game", "lobby-1");
```

## Hard Rules

- this is a client SDK; do not assume privileged admin/server helpers exist here
- `eb::EdgeBase` is the main entry point
- `client.db(namespace, instanceId?)` takes the instance id positionally
- `TableRef` is an immutable query builder; chain `where`, `orderBy`, `limit`, `page`, `after`, `before`, or `search` before `getList()`
- `auth().currentUser()` returns a JSON string, not a typed user object
- `storage().bucket(name)` returns a bucket-scoped client
- `functions().get/post/put/patch/del` use function paths like `"jobs/run"`
- `push()` requires native token/provider wiring from the host app
- `room(namespace, roomId, opts?)` returns a `std::shared_ptr<edgebase::RoomClient>`

## Common Mistakes

- do not invent a C++ admin SDK surface that is not present in this package
- do not expose privileged secrets in shipped native client binaries
- do not pass instance ids as named objects; use `db("workspace", "ws-1")`
- do not assume `currentUser()` returns parsed structs; it returns raw JSON
- do not copy JavaScript async/Promise syntax into C++
- do not use Unreal-specific `UObject`, `Blueprint`, or `FString` types in pure core code

## Quick Reference

```text
eb::EdgeBase(url)                                        -> client entry point
client.auth()                                            -> AuthClient
client.storage()                                         -> StorageClient
client.push()                                            -> PushClient
client.functions()                                       -> FunctionsClient
client.analytics()                                       -> AnalyticsClient
client.db(namespace, instanceId?)                        -> DbRef
client.room(namespace, roomId, opts?)                    -> shared_ptr<edgebase::RoomClient>
client.setContext(map)                                   -> void
client.setLocale(locale)                                 -> void
client.auth().signUp(email, password, displayName?, captchaToken?) -> Result
client.auth().signIn(email, password, captchaToken?)     -> Result
client.auth().currentUser()                              -> std::string
client.db("shared").table("posts").getList()             -> Result
client.storage().bucket(name).upload(key, bytes, type)   -> Result
client.functions().post(path, jsonBody)                  -> Result
```
